title: vitis dentata
intro: Vitis dentata, also known as the Bitter Grapevine or Chinese Grapevine, is a plant species native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Vitaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. Vitis dentata has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use.
